name: Angel Biscuits (No Rising Necessary)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the water.
2. In a bowl, sift together the flour and other dry ingredients (salt, baking powder, soda).
3. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add buttermilk to the mixture; stir until all flour is dampened.
5. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead gently for about one minute.
6. Roll out to desired thickness and cut with a biscuit cutter.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. The dough can be kept refrigerated and used within about a week.
